title: collect_two_string_lists intermediate Vec allocation
description: collect_two_string_lists builds a Vec<Vec<&str>>, then clones the first and second elements to return (names, keys). This allocates a Vec of Vecs just to extract two items. Since the function is called at the tail of each extract chain in the eval hot path (after the 3-4 Vec allocations noted separately), it adds two more small Vec allocations per test. Fix: take the already-filtered slice and directly scan for the first and second Str/StringList forms, returning them as (&[&str], &[&str]) or as references without constructing intermediate collections. Expected impact: 2 fewer small allocations per test per message, additive with the extract-chain fix.
